## Risk Areas

- [ ] Auto-placement behavior or measurement logic
- [ ] Export or design-file compatibility
- [ ] Wall geometry, snapping, or drag interactions
- [ ] Theme, layout, or responsive UI behavior
- [ ] Dependency, licensing, or policy surface changes
